underlying_goal: Convert markdown files to PDFs, generate a specific PDF, and create a new 'excel-report' skill for summarizing CSV/XLSX data into structured markdown reports
friction_detail: WeasyPrint required missing GTK native libraries on Windows requiring a fallback to xhtml2pdf; user interrupted a batch conversion; session ended at usage limit before the SKILL.md was written.
brief_summary: User wanted to batch-convert markdown to PDF and create an excel-report skill; PDF conversion was achieved after dependency workarounds, the skill was mostly drafted with tests launched, but the session hit the usage limit before the final SKILL.md could be written.
